title: Protocol 2 for PCR set-up
author: Opentrons
description: This protocol performs the transfer of mastermix and samples from a source to a destination PCR plate.
steps_raw: This protocol performs the transfer of mastermix and samples from a source to a destination PCR plate.
Aliquot 15uL of master mix from a PCR tube strip into an ABI 96 well fast start PCR plate
Aliquot 10uL of sample from the deep well RNA plate to the ABI 96 well PCR plate
